content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Fairview Legal Group
Customer ID: C009
Contract ID: K010
Account Executive: Tom Rivera
Call Type: 90-Day Check-in
Date: August 2, 2023
Participants: Tom Rivera (AE), Claire Osei (Managing Partner)

Tom Rivera: Claire, three months in — how are things going with the management team?

Claire Osei: It's been a positive experience. The matter performance dashboards have replaced the spreadsheet reports we were producing manually each month. Our office manager has probably saved four to five hours a month just from that change.

Tom Rivera: That's meaningful time. Any friction points?

Claire Osei: One thing — we had a partner ask why they couldn't drill down into individual associate billing detail from the dashboard. Right now the dashboard shows aggregate hours by matter but not by individual attorney.

Tom Rivera: That level of granularity should be achievable with the custom report builder. It's not set up by default but I can have our solutions team walk you through it. It's probably a 30-minute configuration.

Claire Osei: That would be helpful. Can you arrange that?

Tom Rivera: I'll get something on the calendar this week. Anything else?

Claire Osei: One longer-term thought — we have a sister firm in Atlanta that's expressed interest in what we're doing. I'd be willing to make an introduction if this continues to go well.

Tom Rivera: I'd welcome that, Claire. No pressure at all — let's make sure your team's experience is exactly where you want it first.
